message: Operation 'restoreBackup' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Current summary and description are extremely vague and provide no actionable information. Enhanced summary clarifies the action (restore data) and scope (from a backup package). Enhanced description explains required inputs (backup ID parameter and request body configuration), expected output (RunInfo object with job details), side effects (asynchronous process), and provides guidance for AI agents on how to monitor the operation. Terminology is consistent with API context (RunInfo schema, backup packages).

data.summary_suggestion: Restore data from a backup package
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a restore operation to recover data from a specified backup package identified by the backup ID. Accepts restore configuration parameters in the request body. Returns a RunInfo object containing the restore job details including job ID, status, and execution timestamps. This operation triggers an asynchronous restore process that may take time to complete depending on data volume. Monitor the returned job ID to track restore progress.
data.reasoning: Current summary and description are extremely vague and provide no actionable information. Enhanced summary clarifies the action (restore data) and scope (from a backup package). Enhanced description explains required inputs (backup ID parameter and request body configuration), expected output (RunInfo object with job details), side effects (asynchronous process), and provides guidance for AI agents on how to monitor the operation. Terminology is consistent with API context (RunInfo schema, backup packages).
